name: Next-js-Boilerplate
description: 🚀🎉📚 Nextjs Boilerplate and Starter with App Router and Page Router support, Tailwind CSS 4 and TypeScript ⚡️ Made with developer experience first: Next.js 16 + TypeScript + ESLint + Prettier + Drizzle ORM + Husky + Lint-Staged + Vitest + Testing Library + Playwright + Storybook + Commitlint + VSCode + Sentry + PostCSS + Tailwind CSS ✨
